body.title: Move lab/docs/ → docs/ and update all referrers
body.result: git mv lab/docs → docs; all referrers updated in skills/ source + ~/.claude/skills/ deployed copies + lab/claudecode/ + BRAINSTORM.md; deploy skipped (deployed skills ahead of source — separate cleanup needed)
body.description:
lab/docs/ contains docs meant for humans (Levers, QE_in_the_Age_of_AI, the_ownership_gap, html_spec_template, callmap). The canonical public docs dir is docs/. These should live together. lab/docs/ was never the right home — it was a convenience location from when the project was less mature.

Referrers that must be updated before the move:
- ~/.claude/skills/sprint-ticket/SKILL.md (references lab/docs/Deterministic_AI_Development_Levers...)
- ~/.claude/skills/day-close/SKILL.md (git add includes lab/docs/)
- ~/.claude/skills/day-close-audit/SKILL.md (capability_map.md path)
- ~/.claude/skills/decided/SKILL.md and skills/sorted/SKILL.md (html_spec_template path)
- lab/claudecode/callmap.py (default output path lab/docs/callmap.md)
- lab/claudecode/audit_checks.json (callmap.md path)
- BRAINSTORM.md (several lab/docs/ references)

**Affected files:** lab/docs/ (all files), skills/ (5 files), ~/.claude/skills/ (5 deployed copies), lab/claudecode/callmap.py, lab/claudecode/audit_checks.json, BRAINSTORM.md
**Design rules:** no broken skill paths; skills are the primary consumer of these docs
**Scope boundary:** IN — git mv lab/docs/* docs/; update all referrers listed above; redeploy skills; OUT — do not change doc content during the move (content pass is separate)
**Completion criteria:** `grep -rn 'lab/docs' skills/ ~/.claude/skills/ lab/claudecode/ *.md` returns 0 hits; all moved files accessible at docs/<name>; `agentctl skills deploy` succeeds
